ham: Dear Customer, this is an automatic notification from your ISP. Our broadband engineer, Mr. Sharma, will be visiting your residence at 3:00 PM tomorrow to perform routine maintenance and upgrade the router. Please ensure you or a resident is available. Thank you for choosing NetConnect.
spam: Hi, this is an official notice from your credit card issuer. Your account has been selected for a special limit increase of ₹50,000. Please confirm your identity by replying YES or clicking the secure link below. <URL> Offer valid for 24 hours only. Act now!
